{{Quote|We'll be meeting in the conference room in five minutes. I'd like you to be there, Luke.|[[Oleson]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
The '''New Academy for Space Pilots''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] flight academy located on an [[Unidentified planet (New Academy for Space Pilots)|unidentified planet]].

==History==
The New Academy for Space Pilots was commanded by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oleson]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|407|Oleson, General}}</ref> It was responsible for training the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Planetary Pioneers]].<ref name="TMM" />

Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] attended the New Academy for Space Pilots as a member of the Planetary Pioneers. During that time, he was responsible for destroying a [[Unidentified maverick moon|maverick moon]] on a collision course with the [[Unidentified planet (New Academy for Space Pilots)|planet]] housing the academy. Following the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] destruction through the use of [[Zukonium ray]]s, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] awarded Skywalker a [[medal of honor]] for saving the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the academy.<ref name="TMM" />
